name: Vegetarian Kishke
recipeInstructions:
1. Traditionally, kishke is prepared by stuffing a seasoned mixture of flour, onion, and meat into casings. This recipe offers a flavorful vegetarian version.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients thoroughly.
3. Spoon half of the mixture onto a piece of aluminum foil and roll into a cylinder. Repeat with the remaining mixture to create two cylinders.
4. Place the cylinders on a cookie sheet or baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
6. Turn the cylinders upside down and continue cooking for an additional 45 minutes.
7. Remove the cylinders from the foil and discard it.
